subcodes.first_line: Lauded be Thy name, O my God! I can discover no one in Thy realm who can befittingly turn unto Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لااجد فی مملکتک من یقدر ان یقبل الیک حق الاقبال او یستمع ما
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
